description_long: This helmet features a smooth, rounded shell with a matte black finish, giving it a stealthy and minimalistic appearance. The front of the helmet has a rectangular eye opening, bordered by a tan or gold frame, through which two large, cartoonish white eyes with black pupils are visible, suggesting a playful or character-inspired design. The helmet lacks any visible ventilation openings, external attachments, or graphic embellishments, maintaining a uniform surface. There are no visible logos, brand markings, or text on the exterior. The side and rear views reveal a consistent, seamless curvature, with no protrusions or structural breaks. The overall form and lack of visible retention system suggest a simple, slip-on style helmet, likely made from lightweight plastic or composite materials.
description: A matte black, rounded helmet with a tan-framed eye opening and cartoonish eyes, featuring a smooth, seamless surface and no visible graphics or vents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tan-framed eye opening with two large, cartoonish eyes, set in a smooth, matte black shell.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the helmet's rounded profile and seamless surface, with the eye opening slightly protruding.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a uniformly curved, featureless matte black surface with no openings or markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the helmet's smooth, rounded shape and the edge of the eye opening.
